title: West African Oral Traditions
description: Oral histories, praise poetry, and spoken knowledge systems, including Ifa corpus, griots, and community testimony.

title: Decolonial Theory Canon
description: Foundational texts by Fanon, Cabral, Nkrumah, Wiredu, Gyekye, Mbembe, Santos, Escobar, and beyond.

title: African Material Culture
description: Textiles, artefacts, ceramics, metals, and objects as knowledge carriers, including documentation of looted and repatriated works.
